LEADERS OF THE MARKET
SMARTSINVESTS

Smarts-invests is a unique online investment platform, which allows independent investors from all over the world to receive dividends from trading different types of currency on major exchanges.

You think that cryptocurrency trading is too risky, and the entry threshold for the Forex market, as well as stock exchanges, is set too high? With forexinvestchain, you will not have to worry about any of these aspects anymore - entrust your money management to our professional team.

Register account
Investment PLANS
PASSIVE INCOME
Our Offer

Without any doubt, the main advantage of the Smarts-invests platform is the accessibility of our financial program. We are always open to any kinds of investors, in spite of their nationality, country of residence or social status.

Our investment plans, developed by the team of professional traders and economists of Smarts-invests, offer you the most beneficial terms for arranging your own source of passive income. The minimum deposit amount for our platform is only $150, which is much more acceptable than any other trust management options on today’s market.

Take a look at our investment plans and use the profit calculator, in order to find out the amount of income you can expect to make.

Affiliate program
for representatives

Are you a true leader, eager to help not only yourself, but also other investors reach their financial independence? Become an official representative of our company and receive up to 10% of additional income from your partners’ newly created deposits.

Register account
for partners

Invite new clients to join our company, using your referral link that can be found in your personal account, and receive a pleasant bonus from each new deposit they open within our system.

Payment systems
Get prizes foractivity
Learn more

Prizes from Smarts-invests is an opportunity to get up to $100 for free by doing simple actions to promoting our company.

We have prepared 4200 cash prizes. Each participant can receive up to six prizes, if he completes the task in each direction.

Aboutus
information

What we value the most in Smarts-invests is our experience, professionalism and proven reliable strategies. We introduce innovations to the area of currency trading, fine-tuning and bringing them to perfection!

Our team consists of about a hundred of highly qualified specialists, such as financial managers, traders and economists (financial department), programmers and testers (technical department), and customer support agents.

Each specialist of our company has at least 5 years of solid experience in currency and cryptocurrency trading market, asset management and securities markets.

Aside from the investment capital management services, we also offer consulting services for corporations (companies) in the EU, Asia, North and South America.

ourstatistics

We are open to our customers and therefore we are eager to provide access to all the necessary statistics regarding the growth and profits of the company. As economists, we are well aware of the importance of numbers - and in this case, the numbers speak for themselves.

WHY US?
BENEFICIAL COOPERATION

Smarts-invests Company carefully selects only the most promising and high-yielding activities to add to our portfolio, such as currency and stock echange, cryptocurrency trading, financial consulting services. We diversify risks in the most competent manner and use global trends to our advantage.

ASIA
70%

of the total cryptocurrency trading volume occurs on Chinese and South Korean exchanges, where our traders operate

AFRICA
30%

of the gold production volume in the world lies with South African mining companies, whose stocks are traded by Smarts-invests

EUROPE
11

largest companies throughout Europe, Asia and North America use Smarts-invests services

USA
80%

of US stock exchanges is the coverage of trading platforms that we have managed to achieve to date
